arguments.name: --CWD
arguments.description: Working directory

arguments.name: -O|--OUTDIR
arguments.description: Redirect compilation output to a directory

arguments.name: -E|--EXTENSION
arguments.description: Extension for generated JS files (default .fs.js)

arguments.name: -S|--SOURCEMAPS
arguments.description: Enable source maps

arguments.name: --SOURCEMAPSROOT
arguments.description: Set the value of the `sourceRoot` property in generated source maps

arguments.name: --DEFINE
arguments.description: Defines a symbol for use in conditional compilation

arguments.name: -C|--CONFIGURATIONTHE CONFIGURATION TO USE WHEN PARSING .FSPROJ WITH MSBUILD,
DEFAULT IS 'DEBUG' IN WATCH MODE, OR 'RELEASE' OTHERWISE
--VERBOSE
arguments.description: Print more info during compilation

arguments.name: --SILENT
arguments.description: Don't print any log during compilation

arguments.name: --TYPEDARRAYS
arguments.description: Compile numeric arrays as JS typed arrays (default true)

arguments.name: --WATCH
arguments.description: Alias of watch command

arguments.name: --WATCHDELAY
arguments.description: Delay in ms before recompiling after a file changes (default 200)

arguments.name: --RUN
arguments.description: The command after the argument will be executed after compilation

arguments.name: --RUNFAST
arguments.description: The command after the argument will be executed BEFORE compilation

arguments.name: --RUNWATCH
arguments.description: Like run, but will execute after each watch compilation

arguments.name: --RUNSCRIPT
arguments.description: Runs the generated script for last file with node

arguments.name: (REQUIRES `"TYPE": "MODULE"` IN PACKAGE.JSON AND AT MINIMUM NODE.JS 12.20, 14.14, OR 16.0.0)
--YES
arguments.description: Automatically reply 'yes' (e.g. with `clean` command)

arguments.name: --NORESTORE
arguments.description: Skip `dotnet restore`

arguments.name: --NOCACHE
arguments.description: Recompile all files, including sources from packages

arguments.name: --EXCLUDE
arguments.description: Don't merge sources of referenced projects with specified pattern

arguments.name: --OPTIMIZE
arguments.description: Compile with optimized F# AST (experimental)

arguments.name: --LANG|--LANGUAGE COMPILE TO JAVASCRIPT (DEFAULT), TYPESCRIPT, PHP OR PYTHON.
SUPPORT FOR TYPESCRIPT, PHP AND PYTHON IS EXPERIMENTAL.
WHEN SET TO '1' OR 'TRUE', FABLE WATCH WILL POLL THE FILE SYSTEM FOR
CHANGES. THIS IS REQUIRED FOR SOME FILE SYSTEMS, SUCH AS NETWORK SHARES,
DOCKER MOUNTED VOLUMES, AND OTHER VIRTUAL FILE SYSTEMS.

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Remove fable_modules folders and files with specified extension (default .fs.js)
